productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Team Training Black Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this also makes for a great everyday bag to school, college and even work.Height: 19.5" Width: 14" Depth: 10" Capacity: 35 litres Made of polyester and nylon, with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment One front zippered compartment One small pocket to hold your music player, with a headphone pull-out unit One more front zippered compartment with a pouch and zippered pocket, and swoosh branding in print on top for style One small zippered compartment with loops to hang essentials like an umbrella One mesh pocket on the side to hold a sipper Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded and meshed handles and back for carrying ease, ventilation and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries nike swoosh branding on right handle, with white piping on handles for style Ergonomically padded back for carrying comfort with embroidered swoosh silhouette for style Care Hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine washDo not bleach Do not tumble dryDo not wringLine dry Do not iron
